courses.desc: Source maps, interview trails, and a compact reporting workflow for urban stories.

courses.name: Digital Audience
courses.desc: A Digital Audience essay on screen time, algorithmic convenience, and the structural conditions that make passive media feel like the easy choice.

courses.desc: A slot for headline discipline, translation judgement, and copy-editing decisions.

courses.name: Investigative Journalism-II
courses.desc: Advanced investigation portfolio currently in progress.

courses.desc: Case-led work on rights, regulation, and legal constraints around journalism practice.

courses.name: Mass Communication

courses.desc: A second video project focused on production planning, post-production, and packaging.

courses.name: Communication and Technology
courses.desc: Analytical coursework on the politics embedded in technical systems.
